comment: Copy to l10n/screens.json. The expansion agent renders each screen at 1440 and 390 px under the en-XA pseudo-locale.

screens.name: checkout-cart
screens.state: cart with 3 items including one long product name

screens.name: checkout-payment
screens.state: validation errors visible on card fields

screens.name: checkout-confirmation
screens.state: order summary with discount and tax lines
